title: Standing on E
lyrics: I am an empty when you miss me When you see me When you deplete me I'm an empty when you miss me When you see me When you diminish the things in my mind That I need to define Like they're not for you or this moment And I doubt you, I'm depleted From the beginning of the moment you met me I was done, out of gas for this whole life you wish was me again I'm standing on E And you still want me to drive you home Past all the obstacles in your mind No, I'm standing on E I need some fuel of my own design And maybe a little bit of hope Back to me or else I'm depleted The end, it's over You see, I can't understand that I should be me I'm lost and dying cause I think I let you down But in reality you just can't see me Cause I'm standing on E I've got no energy to tell you the thoughts I've already told to everyone I've met I think maybe I should find another way or a source for me to behave correctly But I don't have to, no one told me yet I don't have to conform to you Cause I'm standing on E Waiting for the beat from the beat man to eat from you I'm standing on E and I'm waiting on you More ways if you want More experiences to unfold More, more, more, more I don't even want that, do you? Is that what you adore? Or is it everybody's other view of you that you incorporate Into the thing that says that you can't relate With no gas here, no food, no higher power All we have is fear Standing on E Wasting ecstasy, the best of me And we're standing on E Siphoning the fuel in my life to give to you So you could succeed You got all this meal and all this amazement Why you gotta hate me? Cause I'm on E Emptying thoughts and stealing from my wife A thought that was mine that's gone and you don't see How much it hurts to be me I'm standing on fucking E I'm standing on fucking E I just want a little source of love Like I give everybody else It's too tough here all alone On my worst zone, your worst part Send me a sign to the room And I accept and accept and please Show you nothing but No dedication, laziness and hell I'm sorry I wanted to love you well too So now it seems as you call my friend There's more than that I see a light This ghost has all the ability to fight for me I don't wanna be on E anymore Come give me a source of healing Baby, a source of healing You were independent back when I came Something I can never understand Get up and make your plan go Just remember that Tethered to the love that's standing here behind you I'm the one that put you up there now Remember that when you go off Remember that when you think the world's too tough My hands right beside yours And your head's still hitting the pedal that makes you mine You're standing out here Baby Find some fuel in yourself too Make it brighter now

lyricsSegments.text: I am an empty when you miss me When you see me When you deplete me
I'm an empty when you miss me When you see me
When you diminish the things in my mind That I need to define
Like they're not for you or this moment
And I doubt you, I'm depleted From the beginning of the moment you met me
I was done, out of gas for this whole life you wish was me again
I'm standing on E
And you still want me to drive you home Past all the obstacles in your mind
No, I'm standing on E
I need some fuel of my own design And maybe a little bit of hope
Back to me or else I'm depleted The end, it's over
You see, I can't understand that I should be me
I'm lost and dying cause I think I let you down
But in reality you just can't see me
Cause I'm standing on E
I've got no energy to tell you the thoughts I've already told to everyone I've met
I think maybe I should find another way or a source for me to behave correctly
But I don't have to, no one told me yet
I don't have to conform to you
Cause I'm standing on E
Waiting for the beat from the beat man to eat from you
I'm standing on E and I'm waiting on you
More ways if you want
More experiences to unfold
More, more, more, more
I don't even want that, do you?
Is that what you adore?
Or is it everybody's other view of you that you incorporate
Into the thing that says that you can't relate
With no gas here, no food, no higher power
All we have is fear
Standing on E
Wasting ecstasy, the best of me
And we're standing on E
Siphoning the fuel in my life to give to you
So you could succeed
You got all this meal and all this amazement
Why you gotta hate me?
Cause I'm on E
Emptying thoughts and stealing from my wife
A thought that was mine that's gone and you don't see
How much it hurts to be me
I'm standing on fucking E
I'm standing on fucking E
I just want a little source of love
Like I give everybody else
It's too tough here all alone
On my worst zone, your worst part
Send me a sign to the room
And I accept and accept and please
Show you nothing but
No dedication, laziness and hell
I'm sorry I wanted to love you well too
So now it seems as you call my friend
There's more than that
I see a light
This ghost has all the ability to fight for me
I don't wanna be on E anymore
Come give me a source of healing
Baby, a source of healing
You were independent back when I came
Something I can never understand
Get up and make your plan go
Just remember that
Tethered to the love that's standing here behind you
I'm the one that put you up there now
Remember that when you go off
Remember that when you think the world's too tough
My hands right beside yours
And your head's still hitting the pedal that makes you mine
You're standing out here
Baby
Find some fuel in yourself too
Make it brighter now
